title: citrus × aurantium subf. tosa-asahi
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. tosa-asahi, also known as Tosa Bitter Orange, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, that contribute to its ability to reduce pain and improve overall well-being. The health benefits of Tosa Bitter Orange include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and reduce stress, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and teas. Tosa Bitter Orange can be prepared in various forms, including capsules, tea, and oil, which are often used to support immune function and promote relaxation.
